key.name: badge-position-x
key.description: Horizontal position of the floating badge in pixels from the left edge. A value of -1 means auto-center on the screen.

key.name: badge-position-y
key.description: Vertical position of the floating badge in pixels from the top edge. A value of -1 means auto-position at the bottom of the screen.

key.name: show-badge
key.description: Whether to display the floating voice-status badge on the desktop.

key.name: show-panel-indicator
key.description: Whether to display the GNOME Speaks indicator in the top panel.

key.name: auto-stop-silence-seconds
key.description: Number of seconds of silence before the microphone automatically stops listening. Must be between 1 and 10.

key.name: speak-clipboard-shortcut
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to speak clipboard contents aloud.

key.name: read-selection-shortcut
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to read selected text aloud.

key.name: toggle-voice-quality-shortcut
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to switch between HD (DragonHD) and Fast (Neural) voice modes.
